**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tynanpurdy/musical-text/compare/0.2.0...0.2.2
releases.name: 0.2.2 Revisionist version history

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This one is a doozy. Lots of new features and bug fixes that take this plugin from neat proof of concept to pretty fleshed out. Big thanks to everyone who has downloaded and those who gave feedback (@colintedford, @whoszatarash, @SimonAbrelat)!

Features

- multiple decoration styles (highlight, underline, text color)
- a long list of popular code color palettes to choose from
- a 4th sentence length
- markdown syntax awareness, avoids highlighting list markers
- ribbon icon for mobile users
- toggle off ribbon or status bar icons
- slight styling improvements to highlight mode

Bug fixes

 - line breaks now represent a sentence break
 - in highlight mode, the text color will match hue and maintain AAA contrast
 - something was wrong with mobile, idk what it was, but it seems to be better now
 - thresholds are now enforced to be logical (0 < short < medium < long)
 - improved description and readme
 - obsidian native tooltip on statusbar icon
releases.name: 0.2.0 New features and bug fixes!

releases.author: tynanpurdy
